official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the boss_event packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the boss_event remove-operation body without initialized game state.
Official binary source for the UUID, operation enum, and empty remove-operation body shape.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound boss_event frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses official ClientboundBossEventPacket.createRemovePacket(UUID). The remove operation is context-free and does not require an initialized BossEvent, Level, or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound boss_event packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official UUID remove-operation fixture only; do not infer add/update boss-bar payloads, boss-bar UI behavior, entity/world state, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
